NVDA.name: NVIDIA Corporation
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以CUDA、GPU和全栈数据中心基础设施平台，支撑企业与云端的大模型训练、推理和生成式/智能体AI应用。
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Builds full-stack AI infrastructure and software to power training, inference, and enterprise AI across clouds and data centers.

MSFT.name: Microsoft Corporation
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以云平台、Copilot和代理为核心，把AI嵌入企业工作流，并强调安全、合规与负责任AI。
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Enterprise AI platform strategy embedding Copilot and agents across cloud workflows with security, compliance, and responsible AI.
concrete_bets: Integrated AI-driven security, compliance, and identity

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以AIP把大模型接入Gotham/Foundry，打造面向政企的企业级AI平台。
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Build an enterprise AI platform that connects LLMs to Gotham and Foundry for government and commercial customers.
concrete_bets: LLM orchestration across open-source, self-hosted, and commercial models

META.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
META.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以Meta AI驱动社交产品、内容推荐和AI眼镜，打造跨应用多模态助手与下一代计算平台。
META.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Embed Meta AI across apps and wearables to power recommendations, creation, and next-gen computing experiences.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 多篇都在讲Agent、Codex、企业编排、工具调用与经验学习，核心是把模型接进工作流。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Agentic workflows, tool use, and enterprise orchestration dominate this set.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 聚焦LLM架构、注意力变体、长上下文、并行推理和高效生成，主题是降本提速。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Model architecture and inference efficiency, especially long-context and faster generation.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 围绕评测、治理、隐私和零信任聚合，讨论如何让AI更可验证、更可控。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Evaluation, governance, privacy, and controlled access for trustworthy AI.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: AI被用于医疗、国防、科学研究、地球观测和图像重构，强调真实场景落地。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Applied AI in healthcare, science, defense, and generative research workflows.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 这些文章偏工程和开发者工具，如Datasette、浏览器运行Python和PyTorch性能分析。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Developer tooling and runtime engineering, from Datasette to browser Python and profiling.

alias.notes: 将同义或近义项并入已有规范名；如“Enterprise AI Platform”并入“LLM/生成式AI应用”，“AI系统可观测性”和“Token/成本可观测”并入“AI系统可观测性/成本”，安全相关表述并入“AI安全/Responsible AI”，编码 agent 相关表述并入“AI编码agent当硬技能”。
